extraction.one_line_summary: KUSS Sepp attacked 2km out after full-day breakaway, won stage; MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe took 6-second bonus to steal GC from PINOT Thibaut by 29 seconds.
tactical_patterns: SIVAKOV Pavel crash descending Côte de Mancy destroyed INEOS team cohesion when ALAPHILIPPE Julian abandoned pace to wait for him.
KUSS Sepp freed for stage hunting after ROGLIČ Primož abandoned overnight; Jumbo-Visma pivoted tactics immediately from GC defense to stage aggression.
MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe attacked final climb targeting 6-second time bonus to overcome 18-second deficit, stealing GC while PINOT Thibaut chased wrong wheels.
DUMOULIN Tom repeatedly tested rivals on final climb despite not contending GC, using Tour de France recon to break morale of competitors.

rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: When freed from domestique duties, executed patient attack with 2km remaining on steep section after full-day effort
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: positive: Calculated exactly which time bonuses needed and attacked precisely to steal GC by 29 seconds despite starting stage 1:03 down
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: Lost GC lead by chasing tactically wrong moves, failed to mark MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe's bonus-hunting attacks on final climb
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: negative: Uncharacteristic pedal-strike crash descending Mancy destroyed rhythm, required ALAPHILIPPE Julian to sacrifice position waiting
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: Despite 2:03 GC deficit and no leadership role, aggressively tested rivals on final climb as Tour de France reconnaissance
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: Abandoned overnight after holding yellow jersey through four stages, forcing Jumbo-Visma complete tactical pivot
